findings.description: The failure analysis log output example (障害解析ログの出力例) is omitted. The source includes a concrete log output showing how masked fields appear (e.g., MAIL_ADDRESS=**, MOBILE_PHONE_NUMBER_AREA_CODE=***), which demonstrates the expected runtime behavior of the implementation.
findings.source_evidence:
# 障害解析ログ
2011-09-26 21:06:35.745 -FATAL- root ... MAIL_ADDRESS=********************, MOBILE_PHONE_NUMBER_AREA_CODE=***, ...
